videos.video_subject: The popular myth that Roy Keane's 2001 tackle directly ended Alf-Inge Haaland's football career, despite Haaland finishing the match, playing for Norway four days later, appearing in Manchester City's next league match, and later having surgery on his other knee
videos.video_script: Everyone thinks Roy Keane ended Alfie Haaland's career with this tackle. But Alfie finished the match, played for Norway four days later, then played City's next league game. The surgery that followed was on his other knee. So why does everyone still think...
